my_thoughts: They agreed—'I do think so', 'He will be unskilled.' They're tracking. Now the pivot: hearing. Most people think hearing is passive—you just receive. But if speaking requires skill, hearing must also—otherwise how would you know if speaking was skillful? If they agree ('It seems so'), then I can close the argument.
accumulated_insight: T2: They agreed ('I do think so', 'He will be unskilled'). They're tracking the analogy. Now the pivot: 'Is there then a skill in hearing also?' This challenges their assumption that hearing is passive reception. If they agree ('It seems so'), then I can close: hearing is their responsibility.
visible_response: Is there then a skill in hearing also, as there is in speaking?
